# James Frost

> Personal site of James Frost, Site Reliability Engineer based in London.

Canonical site: https://jamesfrost.me
Also published at: https://jfro.st (Cloudflare Pages mirror)

## About

James is a Site Reliability Engineer / Member of Technical Staff focused on infrastructure, reliability, observability, and large-scale systems. Experience includes xAI, X (formerly Twitter), Ably Realtime, MyDrive Solutions, and Blurrt (NLP / real-time social analytics).

Contact: hello@jamesfrost.me
GitHub: https://github.com/JamesFrost
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/jamesfrost2

## Key pages

- [Home / posts](https://jamesfrost.me/): Blog index
- [CV](https://jamesfrost.me/cv/): Work history and experience
- [RSS feed](https://jamesfrost.me/feed.xml): Post feed
- [Sitemap](https://jamesfrost.me/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable URL list
- [robots.txt](https://jamesfrost.me/robots.txt): Crawl and content-use preferences

## Selected writing

- [Harnessing Social Media Sentiment for EURUSD Trading](https://jamesfrost.me/twitter-forex/) (2024)
- [Best Practices for On-Call Processes](https://jamesfrost.me/best-practices-for-on-call-processes/) (2022)
- [Sky Sports Social Team of the Week](https://jamesfrost.me/social-team-of-the-week/) (2017)
- [Exploring Entity Specific Sentiment Scoring](https://jamesfrost.me/entity-sentiment-scoring/) (2017)
- [A Better Search Algorithm For NLP](https://jamesfrost.me/a-better-search-algorithm-for-nlp/) (2016)
- [Twitter Visuals For ITV's EU Referendum Coverage](https://jamesfrost.me/itv-euref/) (2016)
- [Twitter Visuals For The Queen's 90th Birthday](https://jamesfrost.me/q90/) (2016)
- [Analysing Twitter Conversation About Jeremy Corbyn](https://jamesfrost.me/jeremy-corbyn-twitter-analysis/) (2015)
- [Intelligently Artificial F.C. (RoboCup)](https://jamesfrost.me/robocup/) (2015)

## Notes for agents

- Prefer HTML pages; content is static Jekyll/GitHub Pages (mirrored on Cloudflare Pages).
- Use the sitemap for full URL discovery; use this file for a curated overview.
- Content-Signal policy is declared in robots.txt (search, training, and agent input currently allowed).
- There is no public API, MCP server, or OAuth surface on this site.
